23f032e43185.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
23f032e43185.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
23f032e43185.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

6c5471a5277d.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
6c5471a5277d.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

9151ca6a1aea.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
9151ca6a1aea.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
9151ca6a1aea.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
